WEBUI_PORT.name: WebUI Port
WEBUI_PORT.description: Port where the qBittorrent web interface will be exposed. Default: 8080.

TORRENTING_PORT.name: Torrenting Port
TORRENTING_PORT.description: Port used for torrenting connections (TCP and UDP). Default: 6881.

PUID.name: User ID (PUID)
PUID.description: User ID the process will run as. Use 1000 for the default HA user.

PGID.name: Group ID (PGID)
PGID.description: Group ID the process will run as. Use 1000 for the default HA group.

media_folders.name: Media Folders
media_folders.description: List of host folders made available to qBittorrent. Add or remove paths here — each one must start with /media or /share. The first entry becomes the default save path. Changes take effect after restarting the add-on.
